headline: 1 Software Stock with Exciting Potential and 2 Facing Headwinds
summary: From commerce to culture, software is digitizing every aspect of our lives. In the past, the undeniable tailwinds fueling SaaS companies led to lofty valuation multiples that made it easier to raise capital. But this was a double-edged sword as the high prices exposed them to big drawdowns, and unfortunately, the industry has tumbled by 9.8% over the last six months. This performance is a noticeable divergence from the S&P 500’s 8.4% return.

headline: ServiceNow vs. Salesforce: Which Cloud Software Stock Has an Edge Now?
summary: CRM gains an edge over NOW as strong Agentforce momentum, rising earnings estimates and a lower valuation support its investment case.

headline: Can IBM's Extended ServiceNow Deal Accelerate Enterprise AI Adoption?
summary: International Business Machines deepens its ServiceNow partnership to help enterprises tackle fragmented data and legacy technology barriers to large-scale AI adoption.

headline: Benchmark Maintains Buy on ServiceNow, Raises Price Target to $130
summary: Benchmark  analyst Yi Fu Lee   maintains ServiceNow (NYSE:NOW) with a Buy and raises the price target from $125 to $130.
